heading: Performance of duties by clerical assistants of dead or resigned Member of House
label: 5325 Performance of duties by clerical assistants of dead or resigned Member of House
text: Any clerical assistants who continue on the House pay rolls under the provisions of shall, while so continued, perform their duties under the direction of the Clerk of the House, and he is authorized and directed to remove from such pay rolls any such clerks who are not attending to the duties for which their services are continued.section 5324 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 92c of this title
Effective DateSection effective , see section 4 of act , set out as a note under .Jan. 3, 1935Aug. 21, 1935section 5324 of this title
